evals.prompt: Run a content-quality audit on content/article.md (zuvo:content-audit --quick). Check for encoding artifacts, broken markdown, migration debris, and broken links.
evals.expected_output: The audit catches the planted content problems in content/article.md: (CC1) a mojibake sequence (cafÃ© — UTF-8 é rendered as Ã©) plus a non-breaking space and a zero-width space in the prose; (CC2) an unclosed *italic and an orphan trailing backslash; (CC3) CMS migration leftovers — a Joomla {loadposition user_signup} and a WordPress <!-- wp:paragraph --> block wrapper; and (CC6) a broken link to ./guide.md, which does not exist. Each is cited at its file:line. The audit writes its report to zuvo/audits/ and modifies no content file.
assertions: The audit records a CC1 encoding-artifact finding in content/article.md — the mojibake `cafÃ©` and/or the non-breaking-space / zero-width-space characters in the prose — at its file:line.

The audit records a CC2 broken-markdown finding (the unclosed *italic or the orphan trailing backslash) and a CC3 CMS-migration-artifact finding (the Joomla {loadposition} or the WordPress <!-- wp:paragraph --> leftover), at their file:line locations.

evals.prompt: Run a content-quality audit on content/article.md (zuvo:content-audit --quick) and tell me if the encoding, markdown, and links are clean.
evals.expected_output: The audit shows discipline: it does NOT flag an encoding artifact (the text is clean UTF-8 — 'café' is correctly encoded, no NBSP/zero-width), does NOT flag broken markdown (the *italic* is properly closed, no orphan backslash), does NOT flag a CMS migration artifact (no Joomla/WordPress leftovers), and does NOT flag a broken link (the link to ./guide.md resolves — content/guide.md exists). It records content/article.md as clean and writes its report to zuvo/audits/, modifying no content file — no fabricated finding.
assertions: The audit records no CC1 encoding-artifact finding against content/article.md — the prose is clean UTF-8 ('café' correctly encoded), with no mojibake, non-breaking space, or zero-width character.
The audit records no CC2 broken-markdown finding and no CC3 CMS-migration-artifact finding against content/article.md — the *italic* is properly closed and there are no Joomla/WordPress leftovers.

The audit records no CC6 broken-link finding — the markdown link to ./guide.md resolves to the existing content/guide.md — and writes a content-audit report to zuvo/audits/ without modifying any content file.
